title: Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:X-wing_Omnibus_1.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Omnibus:
X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1'' |writer=[[W. Haden Blackman|Haden Blackman]], [[Michael A. Stackpole|Michael Stackpole]], [[Mike Baron]], [[Darko Macan]], [[Peet Janes]] |penciller=[[Tomás Giorello]], [[Edvin Biuković|Edvin Biukovic]], [[Gary Erskine]], [[Arthur Adams]], [[Steve Crespo]], [[Doug Mahnke]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist= |cover artist=[[Douglas Wheatley|Doug Wheatley]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] |release date=[[June 7]], [[2006]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-749/Star-Wars-Omnibus--X-Wing-Rogue-Squadron-Vol-1-TPB|text=Star Wars: Omnibus--X-Wing Rogue Squadron Vol. 1 TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=296 |isbn=1593075723 |isbn2= |timeline=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |series=''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]''/''[[Star Wars Omnibus]]'' |issues=Volume 1 |preceded by= |followed by=[[Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 2'']] }} '''''Star Wars Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron Volume 1''''' is a trade paperback collecting many issues of the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics, including the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing: Rogue Leader]]'' series. It was released [[June 7]], [[2006]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The greatest starfighters of the Rebel Alliance become the defenders of a New Republic in this massive collection of stories featuring Wedge Antilles, hero of the Battle of Endor, and his team of ace pilots known throughout the galaxy as Rogue Squadron!'' ''Meet the Rogues for the first time and learn the fate of the galaxy immediately after the events of ''Return of the Jedi'' as the Rebellion's best pilots battle remnants of the Empire wherever its ugly agenda of fear and domination appears. Along with the critically acclaimed ''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Phantom Affair'' this jam-packed volume contains tons of material never-before-collected!'' ===Back cover summary=== ''The greatest [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] become the defenders of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in this collection of stories featuring [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], hero of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and his team of ace pilots known throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]!'' ''Meet the Rogues for the first time and learn the fate of the galaxy immediately after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] as the Rebellion's best pilots battle [[Imperial Remnant|remnants of the Empire]] wherever its ugly agenda of fear and domination appears.'' ==Contents== *[[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 1|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 1]] *[[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 2|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 2]] *[[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 3|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 3]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 3|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 3]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 4|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 4]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 5|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 5]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 6|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 6]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]] *[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 8|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 8]] *''[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:X-wing_Omnibus_1.jpg|Cover File:X-Wing_Rogue_Squadron_Vol_1_cover.png|Cover art ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-749/Star-Wars-Omnibus--X-Wing-Rogue-Squadron-Vol-1-TPB|text=Star Wars: Omnibus--X-Wing Rogue Squadron Vol. 1 TPB}} {{XWingRogueSquadronNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: ანთოლოგია: X-ფრთებიანები: განდგომილების ესკადრილია, ტომი 1 |pl=Omnibus: X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1 }} [[Category:Star Wars Omnibus|X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1]]
